title: Personal guarantors and insolvency under IBC: Legal challenges
description: In this Leading Questions piece, Abhishek Kumar and Shubham Singh discuss the position of personal guarantors under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.Question: A personal guarantee is often seen as a secondary obligation. In practice, how accurate is this perception and who can initiate insolvency proceedings against a personal guarantor under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016?Answer: Contrary to the popular belief, personal guarantees are not merely secondary obligations.
